---
title: Touying for Quarto
subtitle: A drop-in Touying base extension
format: touying-typst
theme: default              # default | simple | metropolis | dewdrop | university | aqua | stargazer | clean
aspect-ratio: "16-9"
author:
  - name: Your Name
    affiliations: Your Institution
institute: Your Institution
date: today
date-format: long
---

# Getting Started

## Slides Are Headings

A level-1 heading (`#`) starts a new **section**, a level-2 heading (`##`)
starts a new **slide** -- exactly like Touying's native `=` / `==`.

- Standard Quarto + Typst content works as usual
- Pick any built-in theme with the `theme:` option
- All native [Touying](https://touying-typ.github.io) code is available

## Pauses

The Quarto pause marker works:

First this shows.

. . .

Then this appears.

## Incremental Lists

::: {.incremental}
- Revealed first
- Revealed second
- Revealed third
:::

## Columns

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left column.
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
Right column.
:::
::::

::: {.notes}
These are speaker notes -- hidden on the slide.
:::

## Cross-references

Jump to the [[summary]{.button}](#sec-end) with a Beamer-style button.

## Native Touying Animation

Inline pauses with native syntax: here #pause and now more.

## Advanced: Complex Animation

::: {.complex-anim repeat="4"}
At subslide #only("2-")[two and later] and #uncover("3-")[three and later].
:::

## Summary {#sec-end}

That's the tour.
